docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $933.99 FILED BY PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT PESE, TILEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $95) SERVED MAY-18-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PESE, TILEI
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-01-2022 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF TOMAS PENA, REPRESENTED BY IRENE PENA, STORE MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TILEI PESE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PESE, TILEI $933.98 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,058.98 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) IRENE PENA, STORE MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PENA, TOMAS DBA LATIN JEWELERS
